SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-12-2021 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANDERSON W DAVIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JULIANA POPA. DEFENDANT JULIANA POPA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTHONY MAGLONG IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IS FILED ON DEFENDANTS JULIANA POPA AND ANTHONY MAGLONG. DEFENDANT JULIANA POPA WILL NOT WAIVE SERVICE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, ANDERSON W RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE $1,201.15 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,296.15, DEFENDANTS ANTHONY MAGALONG AND JULIANA POPA ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DAVIS, ANDERSON W AS TO DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE POPA, JULIANA MAGALONG, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2021 - JUDGMENT. SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF ANDERSON W. DAVIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT J.P. MORGAN CHASE, REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY MAGALONG, PRIVATE CLIENT BANKER IS PRESENT. COURT DETERMINES THAT PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO J.P. MORGAN CHASE IS DETERMINED TO BE VALID BASED ON THE APPEARANCE AND REPRESENTATION OF DEFENDANT ANTHONY MAGALONG. DEFENDANT ANTHONY MAGALONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JULIANA POPA IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISMISSES DEFENDANTS JULIANA POPA AND ANTHONY MAGALONG WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
